presets.name: Crown Tundra
presets.description: Bulbapedia-imported trainer roster for this battle in offline archive form.
howToBeat: Keep a stable answer for aggron, which functions as the likely closer in this roster.
This roster spreads its coverage broadly, so avoid over-specializing into one matchup.
